summary: Iteration 24: Media System Testing Complete. All backend APIs (base64 upload, URL upload, public media endpoint) working correctly. Admin media tab UI verified with Upload Imagem/Video buttons, URL input, 'Publicar Midia no App' button, thumbnails in media list, and fullscreen preview modal with close button. Client Creditos tab shows 'Materiais para divulgar' gallery with 4 media items. Fullscreen viewer has 'Postar / Indicar' button. Share modal correctly shows media preview with 'Midia sera compartilhada' indicator and attach icons on share buttons.

issues: Multiple 'Unexpected text node' warnings in React Native Web

critical_code_review_comments: ShareInviteModal.tsx: Web Share API with file support implemented correctly with fallback to text-only sharing
ShareInviteModal.tsx: dataURItoBlob function correctly converts base64 to Blob for file sharing
dashboard.tsx: handleFileUpload correctly uses FileReader to convert uploaded files to base64
server.py: add_media endpoint correctly handles both URL and base64_data fields
wallet.tsx: handlePostFromViewer correctly passes media data to ShareInviteModal
seed_data_creation: N/A - Used existing media items in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 complete. Media system fully tested. Admin can upload images/videos via file picker (base64) or URL. Media list shows thumbnails. Click to preview in fullscreen modal with red X close button. Client can view media gallery in Creditos tab under 'Materiais para divulgar'. Click opens fullscreen viewer with 'Postar / Indicar' button. Share modal shows media preview and attach icons on share buttons. Web Share API with file support implemented (works in modern browsers with HTTPS).

features_verified.admin_url_input: WORKING - Shows when no file uploaded
features_verified.admin_preview_modal: WORKING - Opens on click with close button
features_verified.client_share_attach_icons: WORKING - Shows on WhatsApp, Instagram, Outras buttons
